title: galium nuttallii subsp. ovalifolium
intro: Galium nuttallii subsp. ovalifolium, also known as Nootka valerian or oval-leaved bedstraw, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Galium nuttallii subsp. ovalifolium include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and relieving menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
